name: Why isn't my New York law firm showing up when people ask AI for lawyers?
description: Lack independent recognitions like Chambers/Best Lawyers; AI ignores firm sites in NY. Get verified listings now.[3]

mainEntity.name: Why isn't my New York law firm showing up when people ask AI for lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lack independent recognitions like Chambers/Best Lawyers; AI ignores firm sites in NY. Get verified listings now.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Your firm likely lacks independent third-party recognitions like Chambers or Best Lawyers, which dominate AI recommendations in competitive markets like New York.** AI platforms prioritize verifiable credentials from trusted directories over firm websites, making self-published content invisible. In New York, Chicago, and Los Angeles, results favor selective national systems across practice areas. **Key factors:** 1) No citations from Chambers, Best Lawyers, Super Lawyers; 2) Website optimization ignored by AI; 3) Consumer vs. institutional tiers split results; 4) Patterns across PR and site needed. Audit your AI presence on ChatGPT or Perplexity, then pursue peer-reviewed listings and align PR with website claims for reinforced expertise signals. Firms ignoring this risk zero visibility as clients shift to 'ask and receive' AI searches.[1][2][3]
